name: The FUTA Adventures of Lara
description:
FUTANARI, NARRATION, RPG, TENTACLES, MAGICAL CREATURES, WARNING: Possible rape - Lara is quite the adventurer. With a cock like a horse, busty and dumb as a brick she stumbles for one adventure to the next. This time she found an old treasure map that might lead her to a huge diamond. On her way through the jungle however she encounters other huge thing.

Spoiler: In this scenario you are the narrator, so you decide what will happen to her. Here are some creatures she might encounter: Tentacle monsters, orcs, plants, bees or goblins.
creator: Loer
